revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} __NOTOC__ ===Usage=== Note that this template does not work as expected on either the mobile site or if users do not have JavaScript enabled. This affects about half of the readers at the English Wikipedia (as of 2016). ====Syntax==== * {{tlx|Category tree}} – basic form, uses the name of the category page it is placed on * {{tlx|Category tree|title}} – uses the [[Help:Template#parameters|unnamed parameter]] title as the category name to be displayed * {{tlx|Category tree|alignright{{=}}yes}} – align to the right * {{tlx|Category tree|depth{{=}}2}} – display the tree already opened to 2 levels (2 is the maximum) * {{tlx|Category tree|help{{=}}no}} – hide the help text about clicking on "►". ====Examples==== {{tlx|Category tree|Films}} will create this box: {{category tree|Films}} {{tlx|Category tree|Films about cats|depth{{=}}1}} will create this box: {{category tree|Films about cats|depth=1}} ===See also=== * {{tl|Category tree all}} – version that lets the user configure the appearance * {{tl|Category tree both}} – displays two showable lists: subcategories at the left and parent categories at the right * [[mw:Extension:CategoryTree]] * [[commons:Template:Category tree]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Category namespace templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} __NOTOC__ ===Usage=== Note that this template does not work as expected on either the mobile site or if users do not have JavaScript enabled. This affects about half of the readers at the English Wikipedia (as of 2016). ====Syntax==== * {{tlx|Category tree}} – basic form, uses the name of the category page it is placed on * {{tlx|Category tree|title}} – uses the [[Help:Template#parameters|unnamed parameter]] title as the category name to be displayed * {{tlx|Category tree|alignright{{=}}yes}} – align to the right * {{tlx|Category tree|depth{{=}}2}} – display the tree already opened to 2 levels (2 is the maximum) * {{tlx|Category tree|help{{=}}no}} – hide the help text about clicking on "►". ====Examples==== {{tlx|Category tree|Films}} will create this box: {{category tree|Films}} {{tlx|Category tree|Films about cats|depth{{=}}1}} will create this box: {{category tree|Films about cats|depth=1}} ===See also=== * {{tl|Category tree all}} – version that lets the user configure the appearance * {{tl|Category tree both}} – displays two showable lists: subcategories at the left and parent categories at the right * [[mw:Extension:CategoryTree]] * [[commons:Template:Category tree]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Category namespace templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} __NOTOC__ ===Usage=== Note that this template does not work as expected on either the mobile site or if users do not have JavaScript enabled. This affects about half of the readers at the English Wikipedia (as of 2016). ====Syntax==== * {{tlx|Category tree}} – basic form, uses the name of the category page it is placed on * {{tlx|Category tree|title}} – uses the [[Help:Template#parameters|unnamed parameter]] title as the category name to be displayed * {{tlx|Category tree|alignright{{=}}yes}} – align to the right * {{tlx|Category tree|depth{{=}}2}} – display the tree already opened to 2 levels (2 is the maximum) * {{tlx|Category tree|help{{=}}no}} – hide the help text about clicking on "►". ====Examples==== {{tlx|Category tree|Films}} will create this box: {{category tree|Films}} {{tlx|Category tree|Films about cats|depth{{=}}1}} will create this box: {{category tree|Films about cats|depth=1}} ===See also=== * {{tl|Category tree all}} – version that lets the user configure the appearance * {{tl|Category tree both}} – displays two showable lists: subcategories at the left and parent categories at the right * [[mw:Extension:CategoryTree]] * [[commons:Template:Category tree]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Category namespace templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} __NOTOC__ ===Usage=== Note that this template does not work as expected on either the mobile site or if users do not have JavaScript enabled. This affects about half of the readers at the English Wikipedia (as of 2016). ====Syntax==== * {{tlx|Category tree}} – basic form, uses the name of the category page it is placed on * {{tlx|Category tree|title}} – uses the [[Help:Template#parameters|unnamed parameter]] title as the category name to be displayed * {{tlx|Category tree|alignright{{=}}yes}} – align to the right * {{tlx|Category tree|depth{{=}}2}} – display the tree already opened to 2 levels (2 is the maximum) * {{tlx|Category tree|help{{=}}no}} – hide the help text about clicking on "►". ====Examples==== {{tlx|Category tree|Films}} will create this box: {{category tree|Films}} {{tlx|Category tree|Films about cats|depth{{=}}1}} will create this box: {{category tree|Films about cats|depth=1}} ===See also=== * {{tl|Category tree all}} – version that lets the user configure the appearance * {{tl|Category tree both}} – displays two showable lists: subcategories at the left and parent categories at the right * [[mw:Extension:CategoryTree]] * [[commons:Template:Category tree]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Category namespace templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: undo wikidata additions from past 2 hours
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} __NOTOC__ ===Usage=== Note that this template does not work as expected on either the mobile site or if users do not have JavaScript enabled. This affects about half of the readers at the English Wikipedia (as of 2016). ====Syntax==== * {{tlx|Category tree}} – basic form, uses the name of the category page it is placed on * {{tlx|Category tree|title}} – uses the [[Help:Template#parameters|unnamed parameter]] title as the category name to be displayed * {{tlx|Category tree|alignright{{=}}yes}} – align to the right * {{tlx|Category tree|depth{{=}}2}} – display the tree already opened to 2 levels (2 is the maximum) * {{tlx|Category tree|help{{=}}no}} – hide the help text about clicking on "►". ====Examples==== {{tlx|Category tree|Films}} will create this box: {{category tree|Films}} {{tlx|Category tree|Films about cats|depth{{=}}1}} will create this box: {{category tree|Films about cats|depth=1}} ===See also=== * {{tl|Category tree all}} – version that lets the user configure the appearance * {{tl|Category tree both}} – displays two showable lists: subcategories at the left and parent categories at the right * [[mw:Extension:CategoryTree]] * [[commons:Template:Category tree]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Category namespace templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} __NOTOC__ ===Usage=== Note that this template does not work as expected on either the mobile site or if users do not have JavaScript enabled. This affects about half of the readers at the English Wikipedia (as of 2016). ====Syntax==== * {{tlx|Category tree}} – basic form, uses the name of the category page it is placed on * {{tlx|Category tree|title}} – uses the [[Help:Template#parameters|unnamed parameter]] title as the category name to be displayed * {{tlx|Category tree|alignright{{=}}yes}} – align to the right * {{tlx|Category tree|depth{{=}}2}} – display the tree already opened to 2 levels (2 is the maximum) * {{tlx|Category tree|help{{=}}no}} – hide the help text about clicking on "►". ====Examples==== {{tlx|Category tree|Films}} will create this box: {{category tree|Films}} {{tlx|Category tree|Films about cats|depth{{=}}1}} will create this box: {{category tree|Films about cats|depth=1}} ===See also=== * {{tl|Category tree all}} – version that lets the user configure the appearance * {{tl|Category tree both}} – displays two showable lists: subcategories at the left and parent categories at the right * [[mw:Extension:CategoryTree]] * [[commons:Template:Category tree]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Category namespace templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

{{Documentation subpage}} __NOTOC__ ===Usage=== Note that this template does not work as expected on either the mobile site or if users do not have JavaScript enabled. This affects about half of the readers at the English Wikipedia (as of 2016). ====Syntax==== * {{tlx|Category tree}} – basic form, uses the name of the category page it is placed on * {{tlx|Category tree|title}} – uses the [[Help:Template#parameters|unnamed parameter]] title as the category name to be displayed * {{tlx|Category tree|alignright{{=}}yes}} – align to the right * {{tlx|Category tree|depth{{=}}2}} – display the tree already opened to 2 levels (2 is the maximum) * {{tlx|Category tree|help{{=}}no}} – hide the help text about clicking on "►". ====Examples==== {{tlx|Category tree|Films}} will create this box: {{category tree|Films}} {{tlx|Category tree|Films about cats|depth{{=}}1}} will create this box: {{category tree|Films about cats|depth=1}} ===See also=== * {{tl|Category tree all}} – version that lets the user configure the appearance * {{tl|Category tree both}} – displays two showable lists: subcategories at the left and parent categories at the right * [[mw:Extension:CategoryTree]] * [[commons:Template:Category tree]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Category namespace templates]] }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} __NOTOC__ ===Usage=== Note that this template does not work as expected on either the mobile site or if users do not have JavaScript enabled. This affects about half of the readers at the English Wikipedia (as of 2016). ====Syntax==== * {{tlx|Category tree}} – basic form, uses the name of the category page it is placed on * {{tlx|Category tree|title}} – uses the [[Help:Template#parameters|unnamed parameter]] title as the category name to be displayed * {{tlx|Category tree|alignright{{=}}yes}} – align to the right * {{tlx|Category tree|depth{{=}}2}} – display the tree already opened to 2 levels (2 is the maximum) * {{tlx|Category tree|help{{=}}no}} – hide the help text about clicking on "►". ====Examples==== {{tlx|Category tree|Films}} will create this box: {{category tree|Films}} {{tlx|Category tree|Films about cats|depth{{=}}1}} will create this box: {{category tree|Films about cats|depth=1}} ===See also=== * {{tl|Category tree all}} – version that lets the user configure the appearance * {{tl|Category tree both}} – displays two showable lists: subcategories at the left and parent categories at the right * [[mw:Extension:CategoryTree]] * [[co:commons:Template:Category tree]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Category namespace templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} __NOTOC__ ===Usage=== Note that this template does not work as expected on either the mobile site or if users do not have JavaScript enabled. This affects about half of the readers at the English Wikipedia (as of 2016). ====Syntax==== * {{tlx|Category tree}} – basic form, uses the name of the category page it is placed on * {{tlx|Category tree|title}} – uses the [[Help:Template#parameters|unnamed parameter]] title as the category name to be displayed * {{tlx|Category tree|alignright{{=}}yes}} – align to the right * {{tlx|Category tree|depth{{=}}2}} – display the tree already opened to 2 levels (2 is the maximum) * {{tlx|Category tree|help{{=}}no}} – hide the help text about clicking on "►". ====Examples==== {{tlx|Category tree|Films}} will create this box: {{category tree|Films}} {{tlx|Category tree|Films about cats|depth{{=}}1}} will create this box: {{category tree|Films about cats|depth=1}} ===See also=== * {{tl|Category tree all}} – version that lets the user configure the appearance * {{tl|Category tree both}} – displays two showable lists: subcategories at the left and parent categories at the right * [[mw:Extension:CategoryTree]] * [[co:commons:Template:Category tree]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Category namespace templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23128882600|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} __NOTOC__ ===Usage=== Note that this template does not work as expected on either the mobile site or if users do not have JavaScript enabled. This affects about half of the readers at the English Wikipedia (as of 2016). ====Syntax==== * {{tlx|Category tree}} – basic form, uses the name of the category page it is placed on * {{tlx|Category tree|title}} – uses the [[Help:Template#parameters|unnamed parameter]] title as the category name to be displayed * {{tlx|Category tree|alignright{{=}}yes}} – align to the right * {{tlx|Category tree|depth{{=}}2}} – display the tree already opened to 2 levels (2 is the maximum) * {{tlx|Category tree|help{{=}}no}} – hide the help text about clicking on "►". ====Examples==== {{tlx|Category tree|Films}} will create this box: {{category tree|Films}} {{tlx|Category tree|Films about cats|depth{{=}}1}} will create this box: {{category tree|Films about cats|depth=1}} ===See also=== * {{tl|Category tree all}} – version that lets the user configure the appearance * {{tl|Category tree both}} – displays two showable lists: subcategories at the left and parent categories at the right * [[mw:Extension:CategoryTree]] * [[co:commons:Template:Category tree]] {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{Documentation subpage}} __NOTOC__ ===Usage=== Note that this template does not work as expected on either the mobile site or if users do not have JavaScript enabled. This affects about half of the readers at the English Wikipedia (as of 2016). ====Syntax==== * {{tlx|Category tree}} – basic form, uses the name of the category page it is placed on * {{tlx|Category tree|title}} – uses the [[Help:Template#parameters|unnamed parameter]] title as the category name to be displayed * {{tlx|Category tree|alignright{{=}}yes}} – align to the right * {{tlx|Category tree|depth{{=}}2}} – display the tree already opened to 2 levels (2 is the maximum) * {{tlx|Category tree|help{{=}}no}} – hide the help text about clicking on "►". ====Examples==== {{tlx|Category tree|Films}} will create this box: {{category tree|Films}} {{tlx|Category tree|Films about cats|depth{{=}}1}} will create this box: {{category tree|Films about cats|depth=1}} ===See also=== * {{tl|Category tree all}} – version that lets the user configure the appearance * {{tl|Category tree both}} – displays two showable lists: subcategories at the left and parent categories at the right * [[mw:Extension:CategoryTree]] * [[co:commons:Template:Category tree]] {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_tree%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} __NOTOC__ ===Usage=== Note that this template does not work as expected on either the mobile site or if users do not have JavaScript enabled. This affects about half of the readers at the English Wikipedia (as of 2016). ====Syntax==== * {{tlx|Category tree}} – basic form, uses the name of the category page it is placed on * {{tlx|Category tree|title}} – uses the [[Help:Template#parameters|unnamed parameter]] title as the category name to be displayed * {{tlx|Category tree|alignright{{=}}yes}} – align to the right * {{tlx|Category tree|depth{{=}}2}} – display the tree already opened to 2 levels (2 is the maximum) * {{tlx|Category tree|help{{=}}no}} – hide the help text about clicking on "►". ====Examples==== {{tlx|Category tree|Films}} will create this box: {{category tree|Films}} {{tlx|Category tree|Films about cats|depth{{=}}1}} will create this box: {{category tree|Films about cats|depth=1}} ===See also=== * {{tl|Category tree all}} – version that lets the user configure the appearance * {{tl|Category tree both}} – displays two showable lists: subcategories at the left and parent categories at the right * [[mw:Extension:CategoryTree]] * [[co:commons:Template:Category tree]] {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
